overrides.expect: \text {(pivot a_{11} = 1)} \quad \left( \begin{array}{c c c c c} \mathbf {1} & \mathbf {1} & \mathbf {1} & \mathbf {1} & \mathbf {6} \\ 0 & - 1 & - 1 & 1 & 0 \\ 2 & 4 & 1 & - 2 & - 1 \\ 3 & 1 & - 2 & 2 & 3 \end{array} \right) \leftarrow \text { pivotal   row }
overrides.new: \text {(pivot }a_{11}\text { = 1)} \quad \left( \begin{array}{c c c c c} \mathbf {1} & \mathbf {1} & \mathbf {1} & \mathbf {1} & \mathbf {6} \\ 0 & - 1 & - 1 & 1 & 0 \\ 2 & 4 & 1 & - 2 & - 1 \\ 3 & 1 & - 2 & 2 & 3 \end{array} \right) \leftarrow \text { pivotal   row }

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \text {For k = 1,2,\ldots,n set} \\ \qquad r _ {k k} = \| \mathbf {a} _ {k} \| \\ \qquad \mathbf {q} _ {k} = \frac {1}{r _ {k k}} \mathbf {a} _ {k} \\ \text {For j = k + 1,k + 2,\ldots,n,set} \\ \qquad r _ {k j} = \mathbf {q} _ {k} ^ {T} \mathbf {a} _ {j} \\ \qquad \mathbf {a} _ {j} = \mathbf {a} _ {j} - r _ {k j} \mathbf {q} _ {k} \\ \text {End for loop} \\ \text {End for loop} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \text{For } k = 1,2,\ldots,n \text{ set} \\ \qquad r _ {k k} = \| \mathbf {a} _ {k} \| \\ \qquad \mathbf {q} _ {k} = \frac {1}{r _ {k k}} \mathbf {a} _ {k} \\ \text{For } j = k + 1,k + 2,\ldots,n, \text{ set} \\ \qquad r _ {k j} = \mathbf {q} _ {k} ^ {T} \mathbf {a} _ {j} \\ \qquad \mathbf {a} _ {j} = \mathbf {a} _ {j} - r _ {k j} \mathbf {q} _ {k} \\ \text {End for loop} \\ \text {End for loop} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l}\text {For i = 1,\ldots,n}\\\text {(1) Choose a pivot element a_{p(j)i} from the elements}\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text {(Strategies for doing this will be discussed later in this section.)}\\\text {(2) Switch the ith and jth entries of p.}\\\text {(3) For k = i + 1,\ldots,n}\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text {Set l_{p(k)i} = a_{p(k)i}/a_{p(i)i}}\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text {For j = i + 1,\ldots,n}\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text {Set a_{p(k)j} = a_{p(k)j} - l_{p(k)i}a_{p(i)j}}\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text {End for loop}\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text {End for loop}\\\rightarrow E n d f o r l o o p\\\rightarrow E n d f o r l o o p\\\end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l}\text{For } i = 1,\ldots,n\\\text{(1) Choose a pivot element } a_{p(j)i} \text{ from the elements}\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text{(Strategies for doing this will be discussed later in this section.)}\\\text{(2) Switch the ith and jth entries of } p\text{.}\\\text{(3) For } k = i + 1,\ldots,n\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text{Set } l_{p(k)i} = a_{p(k)i}/a_{p(i)i}\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text{For } j = i + 1,\ldots,n\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text{Set } a_{p(k)j} = a_{p(k)j} - l_{p(k)i}a_{p(i)j}\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text{End for loop}\\\qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad \text{End for loop}\\\rightarrow E n d f o r l o o p\\\rightarrow E n d f o r l o o p\\\end{array}
